name: FIO
message: FIO (Fourniture Industrielle de l'Ouest) is a French company specializing in providing technical solutions in the fields of automation, hydraulics, pneumatics and modular aluminum systems.The company was founded in 1972 and is engaged in consulting, design, integration and distribution of equipment. The main office of the company is located in the city of Nantes (Loire-Atlantique), and there are also branches in the Paris region and in Rennes (Brittany).FIO positions itself as a reliable partner for clients in the west of France and in the Paris region, providing innovative solutions tailored to the needs of customers, thanks to the high qualifications of its specialists.www.fio.fr
